review_title: Easy to use for transferring data between Systems
description: Layer2 is easy to use and high flexible to transfer data between different sources.
author: Roy B.
pros: It was easy to implement the layer2 connector. and to setup data connections and exchange data between systems.
cons: The Layer2 could connector didn't measure our expectations for data migration for Lotus Notes platform.

review_title: Easy to use, gets the job done well
description: For our current usage scenario it's doing it's job quite well; we haven't stressed it too much yet but so far we haven't encountered any issue or error while configuring and running it.
author: Lorenzo R.
pros: - Ease of installation and usage - Plenty of available connectors - Dependable performance - Reasonable pricing
cons: - Still running on .NET Framework 4.x - Many modern authentication methods (e.g.: OAuth) are missing - Included support coverage and contact methods are unclear
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: syncs randomly fail. JSON script error... or other. then sync fine next. no indication as to the cause.
author: Michael W.
pros: quick and easy setup to get local files synced with sharepoint site
cons: program sometime just does not respond. High memory usage!!!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Robust Product that meets our data sync needs
description: It's been great overall, we can get data we thought we previously could not as it was stored in a different database. Have had no reason to engage with the support team until the upgrade, and the support has been same day and great, much appreciated.
author: Andy W.
pros: The ability to schedule syncs, to have multiple syncs. We use it to bring SQL data into SharePoint online which we loved as there was no other way to achieve what we needed. With Layer2, we can schedule syncs to take place overnight without interrupting business activity. We can then do an afternoon sync and switch data sources in our in-house apps so we have 24/7 data availability. Integration with SharePoint is great!
cons: Found on occasion the job would fail due to throttling (429s). Have just upgraded from v8 to 10 and hopeful that some tweaks have been made. Ran one job already and no errors. This was annoying as it had to be communicated to relevant users within the business whilst the job re-ran taking around 2 hours to complete.

description: We develop "smart solutions" in SharePoint online to meet a variety of business needs. This could include submitting purchase requisitions or requests for a new hire with the use of SharePoint forms and workflows to handle approvals, notifications and processing. The forms include lookup fields from data we maintain in other SharePoint lists. These lists needed to be manually maintained by the process owners since we had no way to sync the data from our business systems. With Layer2, we can now automate the sync of data from our business systems to the SharePoint lists. This frees the process owners from having to manually maintain them. This also ensures that the data is up-to-date and accurate since it now comes from the systems of record.
author: David C.
pros: Layer2 has connectors to a large variety data sources, which makes it easy to extract data from line-of-business systems for import into SharePoint. We use the SQL database connection the most, and being able to write custom queries to pull the data for import into SharePoint lists allows us to use the same database table for multiple SharePoint sync jobs. If columns in the database do not match the names of the columns in SharePoint, Layer2 allows you to customize the mapping. Finally, the sync process is very fast, and I like that it only updates records when there are changes.
cons: It was a little difficult to initially get the connections set up because of the security settings we have in place. We are using the Layer2 software on a virtual computer with SharePoint online with access to our databases and the VMs with a service account. It was a little tricky to get all the permissions set up correctly, but once we figured it out everything worked very smoothly. We probably should have contacted Layer2 support for guidance, but we wanted to figure it out on our own so that we are more likely to remember how it works.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We needed a product that copied files from SharePoint online to a local drive, for processing the files to a server based software program. Layer2 Cloud Connector worked perfectly and was easy to set up for this purpose.When contacting support, the response was Quick and the answers given have always solved our issues.
author: Pelle K.
pros: The Cloud Connector works quick and is easy to set up. The support response is awesome!
cons: For our purpose, we haven't found any issues. A licence had to be renewed after a software upgrade, but we assume this as a natural prosedyre in the life cycle prosess of software products.

description: Overall its good, But lot to improve in terms of stability and memory management.
author: Ranjith P.
pros: Ease of use and price was ok compared with other products
cons: It was stable a year back and latest versions started giving errors in terms of data types of special characters in the data. application is crashing once after your connections increases

description: Was very easy. I downloaded the trial and within 15 minutes was syncing data between SharePoint online and local data sources. I found it to be very intuitive and easy to use.
author: Keith S.
pros: When we moved to SharePoint Online, we needed the ability to "sync" data between multiple sources/targets. Working with 3rd party consultants, they wanted to custom develop ways to do this. We had previously used your BDLC with SharePoint on-prem, so I looked and that's when I found Cloud Connector and it did exactly what we needed it to.
cons: For what we need, I honestly do not have a 'CON' to list.

review_title: Fantastic Product - Easy to use and rock solid
author: Justin M.
pros: I have some processes that sync 100K+ rows. Prior to this we had to utilize SSIS to do these syncs which was cumbersome to create and the performance was terrible. What used to take 1 hour to complete in SSIS takes less than 10 in Layer2.
cons: Parameterization of the data selections (at the destination) would greatly improve this product. Example, when sending data to a SharePoint list, I have to create (and maintain) a separate configuration for each folder that I want to send data to. If we could parametrize the select statement in the destination based on the source I could populate the folder in the source and have 20+ connections consolidated into one. Also, the ability to launch a job remotely (via a webhook or some other method) would be fantastic. If there was some way to trigger the jobs other than the schedule, this could be a game changer of a product.

description: We have solved the issue of not being able to directly query our SharePoint data by being able to extract it into another database. This also allows us to read data from this extracted database using code quicker than when reading directly from a SharePoint list
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like how you can easily sync data from a SharePoint list or document library to a SQL database. It’s also great how it splits out lookup columns into their ids and values.
cons: Syncing data from SharePoint can be slow, especially for document libraries and large lists and libraries.

author: Christian B.
pros: Kopieren von Einstellungen um neue Backuppaare anzulegen.
cons: Die Benutzerführung und Hilfestellung bei der Erstellung von Backups.

description: Wir synchronisieren Daten aus einer SQL-Datenbank nach SharePoint Online.
author: Daniel M.
pros: Das Produkt macht was es soll und das ziemlich stabil und fehlerlos.
cons: Die Benutzeroberfläche, bzw. die einzelnen Optionen sind manchmal etwas unglücklich korrekt zu verstehen

author: Maik W.
pros: sämtliche Synchronisationsmöglichkeiten in jegliche Richtungen und Systeme
cons: Updateprozess könnte in die Software integriert sein.

description: Ein sehr gutes Produkt, um Daten aus Zusatzquellen oder ggf. Altsystemen (im Rahmen einer Migration) abzuziehen.
author: Alexander D.
pros: Installation und Einrichtung waren sehr einfach machbar. Die Umsetzung von ETL-Logik, um im Ziel direkt mit bereinigten Daten zu arbeiten, ist komfortabel.
cons: Eine Nutzung als Cloud Service wäre sehr gut, um die Installation auf einer lokalen/virtuellen maschine überflüssig zu machen.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great product to work with: fast, reliable and great support
author: Kristof T.
pros: Reliable/Stable software A lot of connectors included Thanks to the incremental sync, a lot of data can be handled Great support Easy to approach sales and support people
cons: For this purpose no specific functionality missing

author: Manu A.
pros: Stable back-end solution for keeping local folder in-synch with Sharepoint library.
cons: Setup and configuration was easy. Sufficient for our project.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Patrick K.
pros: Es hat alles sofort funktioniert. Die vordefinierten Connectoren waren sehr hilfreich.
cons: Bis jetzt kann ich nichts sagen. Im Moment läuft alles nach Plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Vielseitige Verbindungen von Cloud zu OnPrem, bei uns nicht mehr wegzudenken!
description: Sehr einfache und vielseitige Verbindungen möglich, schneller und hilfreicher Support
author: Tim B.
pros: Viele Datenquellen: egal ob aus SQL Datenbank, per ODBC, Azure oder Microsoft 365 Listen/Dokumentbibliotheken - mit Layer2 CloudConnector verbinden wir alles mit allem.
cons: Nachvollziehen von Fehlern ist in den Logs manchmal schwierig

author: Pilvilampi H.
pros: The Layer2 Cloud Connector ensured that the integration between our ERP and SharePoint was smooth. The support team at Layer2 deserves a special mention. Whenever we had questions or faced minor hiccups, their team was right there, ensuring we had the answers and solutions we needed.
cons: The current UI gets the job done, but there's potential for a more modern, intuitive, and visually appealing interface. A more refined UI could make the process even smoother.

description: Gute Grundlage um die Kollegen / Kolleginnen mit Daten im Homeoffice zu versorgen
author: Mario D.
pros: Eine gute Alternative, wenn es nicht gewünscht oder möglich ist, den kompletten Datenbestand der Firma in der Cloud vorzuhalten.
cons: Ein transparenteres Management bei Synchronisationsfehlern wäre wünschenswert. Wenn von den Usern mehrere Dateien gleichzeitig geändert werden, an beiden Seiten, gerät das System an seine Grenzen. Leider kein Telefonsupport.

author: Chris S.
pros: Layer 2 makes it very easy to keep data in sync between multiple sources. Our primary use for this product is syncing data between SharePoint and SQL and it does this flawlessly. The product is very reasonably priced and support is quick to respond if you need help. We have used this for about 4 years now and it is one of the few product we have that you can set and forget.
cons: I think the only improvements would be an improved interface that offers help right in the window you need. I don't end up in this application very often though so this is a pretty small con.

description: OK but as a new server live we couldn't transfer the original license from the decommissioned server
author: Eoin M.
pros: Works in background, allows clients connect and review their data we host
cons: Original license non transferable when server upgraded

description: Das Produkt, die Firma und vorallem der Support sind einsame Spitze. Hatte schon lange nicht mehr solch einen guten Support bei anderen Produkten. Macht weiter so.
author: Reto R.
pros: Die vielen Sync und Einstellungsmöglichkeiten. Obwohl es so vielfältig ist, ist die Einrichtung von neuen Verbindungen ein Klacks, auch die Dokumentation im Internet dazu ist sehr gut.
cons: Keine, kann aber auch nicht gross welche nennen, da wir zuvor noch niche mit einem anderen Sync Tool oder ähnlichem gearbeitet haben. Abgesehen von selbst geschriebenen Scripts. :)

description: I was able to use a combination of onedrive sync and layer2 cloud connector to more quickly and accurately sync data from onedrive/sharepoint to a target server then sync that server with a local file server for a cloud/local repository implementation with fewer error and conflicts than onedrive sync tool
author: Dennis S.
pros: Easy set up, clear logging. Integrates with MANY applications, I am using for onedrive/sharepoint specifically as well as server to server synchronization
cons: Nothing really bad, just took multiple steps to enable and turn on scheduling for continuous synch

description: Layer2 helps us to sync SharePoint data to external websites. We also use it to import data from databases in to Sharepoint. This all works great.
author: Vera V.
pros: Product is easy to use. We use it to connect SharePoint to external databases. The product makes sense.
cons: In case of errors, it's sometimes difficult to figure out what exactly goes wrong. Also, one connection became kind of corrupt: we couldn't remove the corrupt field and still haven't figured out why the field was giving trouble.
